message:
fix(tests): correct JSON assertion for pretty-printed output format

Update test_metrics_json_serialization to expect spaces after colons
in JSON output. The JSON serializer produces pretty-printed output with
"key": value formatting, not compact "key":value formatting.

Also sync beads: mark bd-1m8u (E2E Performance Regression Testing) as
in_progress to reflect ongoing work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
